title: A Hero of the Big Snows
actors: Rin Tin Tin, Alice Calhoun, Don Alvarado
plot: Rin-Tin-Tin is saved from the beatings of a trapper by Ed Nolan, a shiftless trapper himself, and 'Rinty" follows Nolan home to his cabin but refuses to enter. Nolan takes him to the home of Mary Mallory, the girl he has failed to...
